heading: Evaluation of drug abuse education and prevention efforts
label: 11842 Evaluation of drug abuse education and prevention efforts

children.heading: Method
children.label: a Method
children.text: The Secretary of Health and Human Services shall develop and conduct a structured evaluation of the different approaches utilized across the Nation to reduce drug abuse.

children.heading: Grants
children.label: b Grants
children.text: The Secretary of Health and Human Services may make grants to or enter into contracts with appropriate entities for the purpose of conducting the evaluations required by subsection (a).

children.heading: Time of reports
children.label: c Time of reports
children.text: The Secretary shall submit a report based on the evaluations prepared under subsection (a) not later than 1 year after , and another report based on such evaluations not later than 3 years after . A third report based on such evaluations shall be submitted by the Secretary not later than .November 18, 1988November 18, 1988January 1, 1994

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: To carry out this section, there are authorized to be appropriated $12,000,000 in fiscal year 1989, and $15,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 1990 through 1993.
